rows.requirement: Depth-aware ordered event replay is deterministic
rows.detail: Ordered market/order events reproduce the same fill/account fingerprint and reject sequence or time regressions.

rows.requirement: Latency degrades execution on a deterministic price path
rows.detail: 3 latency points with increasing adverse cost.

rows.requirement: Partial fills, queue position, and venue rejects are enforced
rows.detail: Resting quantity survives partial execution, aggressor volume clears queue ahead, and invalid venue increments fail before accounting.

rows.requirement: Cancel/fill races and fill invariants have adversarial tests
rows.detail: Late fills are accepted only before cancel acknowledgement; depth and queue conservation are property-tested.
Delay, execution impact, and fees are separated; live depth cases report fee-inclusive shortfall by tier.

rows.requirement: Live public books calibrate simulation error by liquidity tier
rows.detail: 19/19 symbols, 114 cases, 7 with executable two-sided depth; no-book symbols are D/untradeable.

rows.requirement: Paper accounts reconcile exactly and recover after restart
rows.detail: Append-only account events rebuild balances/positions exactly, detect drift, and restore from disk after process restart.
Limits never consume worse prices, visible/depth liquidity caps fills, and unfilled quantities remain pending.
